text:
Froopyland is an artificially generated world created by Rick Sanchez from a collapsed quantum tesseract some time in the 1980s for his daughter, Beth Smith, when she was a little girl. It appears in "The ABC's of Beth".

Rick outright admits that his reason for creating Froopyland was to sequester Beth, who clearly showed strong psychotic tendencies as a child, and protect their neighborhood (though he immediately makes it clear that he didn't do so out of the non-existent goodness of his heart, but just so he wouldn't have to clean up any of Beth's messes). Rick mentioned that all other Ricks also made a Froopyland for their Beths.
